_comment: Expected output from memory_pressure experiment on t3.micro (1GB RAM). Memory aggressor consumes 512MB in same namespace. On a 1GB node, this forces the kernel to reclaim pages, causing GC pressure on the Node.js API service.
_ii_interpretation: II=0.30 — P95 latency increased 30% under 512MB memory aggressor. Higher II than CPU test because Node.js GC is sensitive to page reclaim. LimitRange prevents OOM kills (oom_kill_events=0) but not latency spikes.
